subject: PS
corpus_note: known-bad mutant of ps-exec-r-good-001: uses qnorm(1 - alfa) instead of qnorm(1 - alfa/2) — the common two-sided-vs-one-sided confidence-interval error — so it prints [1] 64.9669 70.0931, not the expected interval. The execution leg must FAIL it. language == subject-exam-language (r).
